hero.desc1: Tu Quy Mango from Thanh Phu, Ben Tre — grown on sandy coastal soil with natural salinity, giving it a unique subtle saltiness on the finish that no other region can replicate.
hero.desc2: Picked fresh in the morning, cold-shipped to Hanoi by afternoon.
hero.desc2Bold: Mr. Phuc answers calls from 4 AM to evening

products.priceNote: Prices change daily — call Mr. Phuc for today's exact price

process.sectionDesc: Tu Quy Mango grown in Can Tho or Tien Giang is still sweet — but it lacks the subtle saltiness on the finish. Only the sandy coastal soil of Thanh Phu produces that.

calendar.sectionTitle: Harvest Calendar — Know the Season, Get the Right Price
calendar.sectionDesc: Tu Quy Mango bears fruit 3 seasons per year — we have stock every month, never out of supply

cddl.title: GI #00124
cddl.desc: Geographical Indication — granted by Vietnam IP Office, 2022

qr.title: QR Traceability
qr.desc: Farm name, harvest date, picker identity

wholesale.headline: Farm-gate price — no middlemen
wholesale.desc: Buy direct from the farm, no intermediaries, no markups. Prices updated every morning, packed to your specifications — whatever you need, we deliver.
items: Wholesale pricing by ton, updated daily
Minimum order: 1 box (20kg) — try before committing
Shipping cost quoted upfront — varies by route & packaging
wholesale.ctaNote: Zalo reply within 5 min · 4 AM – 6 PM · Mr. Phuc

social.sectionDesc: Videos filmed at the Thanh Phu orchard — harvesting, packing, shipping. No staging, no filters.

news.sectionDesc: Monthly price updates, mango recipes, and stories from Thanh Phu farm — updated regularly

contact.tipDesc: Start with 1 box (20kg), test-sell for 2–3 days, see how your customers compare it to your current supplier. If they prefer it, scale up gradually — no pressure from us.
contact.formNotePlaceholder: e.g. Need 50kg ripe Grade 1 mango, delivered every Wednesday...

contact.formSuccessCallback: Mr. Phuc will call {phone} within 15 minutes (business hours).
